primary.usage: Primary actions, selected navigation, focus rings, active filters, resource links.

accent.usage: Live status, topology signal lines, AI analysis, streaming and runtime connection states.

themeModes.contract: Both themes must preserve hierarchy, contrast, spacing, states, and all information. No dark-only features.

glass.rule: Glass must improve depth or focus; otherwise use solid surface tokens.

informationArchitecture.rule: Do not duplicate features. Add new capability as a view, tab, panel, or mode inside its owning domain before adding navigation.

owningDomains.cost: Overview or Observability until backed by dedicated data model

componentRules.buttons: One primary action per surface; icon-only controls require aria-label.
componentRules.tables: Compact, bordered, solid backgrounds; no heavy blur behind data.
componentRules.drawers: 12px radius, structured header/body/footer, keyboard close path, mobile width guard.
componentRules.modals: Use for blocking decisions only; destructive actions require explicit confirm state.
componentRules.chips: Pill shape for filters and status; show applied count and clear affordance where relevant.
componentRules.workbenches: Topology, AIOps, AI, terminal, and logs may use controlled glass and halo focus.

acceptance: Dark and light themes both pass contrast review for core surfaces.
No duplicate navigation entries for the same user job.
No new page-local color system when ops tokens exist.
Every icon-only control has an accessible name.
Reduced motion path exists for halo, scan, and streaming effects.
